# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Resources/deploymentScripts"
    apiVersion: "2019-10-01"
    name: "enableIdentity"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      forceUpgradable: true
      scriptContent: |
        # Enable Managed Identity for the Function App
        $identity = $resourceGroup | Get-AzResource -ResourceType "Microsoft.Web/sites" -ResourceName "[parameters('functionAppName')]" | Get-AzResource | Set-AzResource -IdentityType SystemAssigned
      cleanupPreference: "Always"

  - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
    apiVersion: "2018-11-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    kind: "functionapp"
    identity:
      type: "SystemAssigned"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
            value: "[parameters('storageConnectionString')]"
          - name: "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME"
            value: "dotnet"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2018-01-01-preview"
    name: "[guid('StorageReaderAssignment')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/[guid('Storage Blob Data Contributor')]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2018-01-01-preview"
    name: "[guid('KeyVaultReaderAssignment')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/[guid('Key Vault Secrets User')]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2018-01-01-preview"
    name: "[guid('SqlContributorAssignment')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/[guid('SQL DB Contributor')]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2018-01-01-preview"
    name: "[guid('CosmosDbReaderAssignment')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/[guid('Cosmos DB Account Reader Role')]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  storageConnectionString:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
